query: Add an Elysia route with TypeBox validation, typed error responses, and a Bun unit test using app.handle.
Wire @elysia/openapi and Eden Treaty for this API so the frontend has end-to-end types.
This Elysia plugin lifecycle hook is not applying to child routes. Help me fix the scope and dependency setup.
Create a WebSocket endpoint in Elysia with validation and a small test plan.
Write a Bun script that renames files and prints JSON to stdout.
Build a React accessible combobox component with controlled and uncontrolled state.
Choose a Drizzle migration flow and update drizzle.config.ts for PostgreSQL.
Map a Spring Data JPA entity and fix a Hibernate N+1 query.
